Order (manual confirmation)

Submit the form, then pay via Interac e-Transfer. We’ll confirm manually.

After submitting, you’ll see an order ID. Use it in your payment note.

Payment

Method: Interac e-Transfer
Recipient: payto@example.com
Payment note: 备注请填：ORDER-{timestamp}-{name}
We confirm within 12 hours after receiving payment.
Contact: WeChat your_wechat_id · Email host@example.com

FAQ

Is it refundable?
No refunds. You can transfer to a friend (tell us the new name).
What do I show at the door?
Show your payment receipt + your name.
